operator_instances.transformation_goal: Augment the verifier with additional assertion-based tests that validate all returned values and ensure numerical consistency and determinism.
operator_instances.rationale: The original test only checks length, first, and last elements. Stronger verification ensures all 12 values are correctly encoded, that the function is deterministic, and that the profile adheres to expected ranges (0-1). This aligns with the V axis increasing oracle complexity.

new_hidden_tests.description: Check that the function returns the exact expected list of 12 values.
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
profile = get_default_error_profile()
assert profile == [1, 0.06, 0.02, 0.02, 0.01, 0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.0005], "Profile does not match expected values"
result = True

new_hidden_tests.description: Ensure the function returns the same list when called multiple times and that it is not the same object.
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
profile1 = get_default_error_profile()
profile2 = get_default_error_profile()
assert profile1 == profile2, "Profiles are not equal"
assert profile1 is not profile2, "Profiles are the same object"
result = True

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Verify that get_default_error_profile returns the exact standard Illumina error profile.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The returned list must exactly match the expected values: [1, 0.06, 0.02, 0.02, 0.01, 0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.0005].
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the function returns any different values, the test fails.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Calls get_default_error_profile and asserts the list equals the known correct profile.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Ensure the function is deterministic and returns independent copies each call.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Two consecutive calls return equal but not identical lists.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the function returns the same mutable object or different values, the test fails.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Calls get_default_error_profile twice and checks equality and identity.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the exact value requirements and determinism requirement.
